sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94200" key="sinamw/reuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐνᾰμώρ-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a stolen dainty</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">230</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
